alert.description_short: Displays an alert dialog with a message to the user.

align.description_short: Sets alignment of content within the element.
align.example:
Left aligned
Center aligned
Right aligned

valign.description_short: Sets the vertical alignment of content within the element.
valign.example: Top aligned Middle aligned Bottom aligned

bgcolor.description_short: Sets the background color of the element.
bgcolor.example: This div has a light blue background

bgimage.description_short: Sets the background image of the element.

border.description_short: Sets the border of the element.
border.example: This div has a black border

boxshadow.description_short: Applies a shadow effect to the element.
boxshadow.example: This div has a shadow

click.description_short: Executes an action or expression when the element is clicked.

cursor.description_short: Sets the cursor when hovering over the element.
cursor.example: Default Pointer Text Move Wait Crosshair Not Allowed Help Progress Grab Grabbing Cell Copy Alias Zoom In Zoom Out Col Resize Row Resize N Resize S Resize E Resize W Resize NE Resize NW Resize SE Resize SW Resize

confirm.description_short: Shows a confirmation dialog to the user.

data-src.description_short: Specifies the source URL or endpoint for data to be fetched and bound to the element.

data-iterate.description_short: Indicates that the element should iterate over an array from the data source.

data-onempty.description_short: Executes actions when the fetched data is empty. Accepts any action expression supported by app.call.
data-onempty.example: No results found

data-onnotempty.description_short: Executes actions when the fetched data is not empty. Accepts any action expression supported by app.call.
data-onnotempty.example: Not empty!

escape.description_short: Escapes HTML or special characters to display as plain text.

flex.description_short: Sets flex properties for the element.
flex.example: 1 2 3

flexdirection.example:
1 2 3
1 2 3

flexitem.description_short: Sets properties of a flex item.
flexitem.example: Flex 1 Flex 2

font.example: This text uses a custom font

grid.example: 1 2 3 4

height.description_short: Sets the height of the element.

hrefhost.description_short: Sets the base URL based on host match.

if.description_short: Conditionally executes actions based on a comparison.

include.description_short: Includes another internal HTML file or page fragment into the element.

insertbeforebegin.description_short: Inserts new content immediately before the element.

insertafterbegin.description_short: Inserts new content just inside the element, before its first child.

insertbeforeend.description_short: Inserts new content just inside the element, after its last child.

insertafterend.description_short: Inserts new content immediately after the element.

justifycontent.description_short: Aligns flex items along the main axis.
justifycontent.example: 1 2 3

keyboard-key.description_short: Defines one or more keys that trigger the element's action. Multiple keys can be separated by a semicolon.

lineheight.description_short: Sets the height of text lines.

lowercase.example: THIS TEXT WILL APPEAR IN LOWERCASE LETTERS

margin.example: This div has 20px margin on all sides

minheight.example: This div cannot be shorter than 100px

minwidth.example: This div cannot be narrower than 200px

maxwidth.example: This div cannot be wider than 400px

mouseout.description_short: Executes an action when the mouse leaves the element.

mouseover.description_short: Executes an action when the mouse enters the element.

navigate-go.description_short: Programmatically triggers navigation as if a user clicked a link. Loads the target page via the Navigate module into the specified container without a full page reload.

onconfirm.description_short: Triggered when the user confirms an action in a confirmation dialog.

onconfirmvalue.description_short: Triggered when a confirmation dialog is accepted; typically used to pass a value or trigger chained actions.
onconfirmvalue.example: <button click="confirm:[Are you sure?]" onconfirmvalue="true;settext:[Confirmed with yes]">Delete Item</button>

onclicked.description_short: Triggered when the element is clicked.
onclicked.example: <button click="sethtml:[Button clicked!]" onclicked="insertbeforeend:[ Added after]">Click me</button>

onenabled.description_short: Triggered when the element or feature becomes enabled.

ondisabled.description_short: Triggered when the element or feature becomes disabled.

onfocused.description_short: Triggered when the element gains focus.

onblur.description_short: Triggered when the element loses focus.

onhide.description_short: Triggered when the element is hidden.

onshow.description_short: Triggered when the element is shown.
onshow.example: Hidden Panel

onsubmitted.description_short: Triggered when a form is submitted.

placeholder.description_short: Displays placeholder text when the element is empty.

placeholdercolor.description_short: Sets the color of the placeholder text.

resize.description_short: Sets resize behavior of the element.
resize.example:
<textarea resize="both" width="200px" height="100px">You can resize me</textarea>
<textarea resize="none" width="200px" height="100px">You cannot resize me</textarea>

resetvalue.description_short: Resets the value of the element.

runorder.description_short: Runs attributes in the specified order inside the element.

setaction.description_short: Sets or changes the action URL of a form.

setmax.description_short: Sets the maximum value of a progress bar or input range element.

setattr.description_short: Sets an attribute on the element.

sethref.description_short: Sets the href attribute of the element.

setqueryhref.description_short: Updates the href attribute of the element with operation support.
setqueryhref.example:
Next Page
Previous Page
Zoom In
Zoom Out
Add 5 Points
Subtract 3 Points

setvalue.description_short: Sets the value of the element.

setid.description_short: Sets the id of the element.

setname.description_short: Sets the name of the element.

setsrc.description_short: Sets the source of the image.

slice.description_short: Extracts part of the content by index.

split.description_short: Splits content by delimiter and returns a part.

togglevalue.description_short: Toggles the value of the element.

trim.description_short: Removes whitespace from the start and end of content.

trimleft.description_short: Removes characters from the start of content.

trimright.description_short: Removes characters from the end of content.

uppercase.example: This text will appear in uppercase letters

width.description_short: Sets the width of the element.
width.example:
This div is 200px wide
This div is 50% of its container's width

wordbreak.description_short: Sets how words break in text.
wordbreak.example:
Thisisaverylongwordthatmayoverflow.
Thisisaverylongwordthatmayoverflow.
This is a long sentence that will not break words in CJK text.

whitespace.example:
This text has normal whitespace.
This text preserves all spaces and line breaks.
This text will not wrap onto the next line, even if it overflows.

zindex.description_short: Sets the stacking order of the element.
zindex.example: On top Behind

zoom.description_short: Sets zoom scale of the element.
zoom.example: This text is zoomed in by 150%

absolute.description_short: Sets the element to absolute positioning.
absolute.example: Absolute

alignitems.description_short: Aligns flex items along the cross axis.
alignitems.example: Centered

alignself.description_short: Overrides the align-items value for a specific flex item.
alignself.example: Normal Self end

bindappend.description_short: Binds and appends data from another element.

block.description_short: Sets the element display to block.
block.example: This span is now block-level

borderbottom.description_short: Sets the bottom border of the element.

borderleft.description_short: Sets the left border of the element.

borderright.description_short: Sets the right border of the element.

bordertop.description_short: Sets the top border of the element.

clone.description_short: Clones an element's content into the current element.

fixed.description_short: Sets the element to fixed positioning.
fixed.example: Fixed header

flexgrow.description_short: Sets the flex grow factor of a flex item.
flexgrow.example: Fixed Grows

float.description_short: Sets the float direction of the element.
float.example:
Float left

Text wraps around the floated element.

gap.description_short: Sets the gap between flex or grid items.
gap.example: 1 2 3

gridarea.description_short: Sets the grid area of an element.
gridarea.example: Spans 2 rows 2 3

gridcolumn.description_short: Sets the grid column position of an element.
gridcolumn.example: Spans 2 columns 2

gridcolumns.description_short: Defines the column template for a grid container.
gridcolumns.example: 100px 1fr 2fr

gridrow.description_short: Sets the grid row position of an element.
gridrow.example: Spans 2 rows 2 3

gridrows.description_short: Defines the row template for a grid container.
gridrows.example: 50px 100px 50px

inherit.description_short: Sets a CSS property to inherit from its parent.

initial.description_short: Sets a CSS property to its initial value.

inline.description_short: Sets the element display to inline.
inline.example:
Inline div
Inline div

inlineblock.description_short: Sets the element display to inline-block.
inlineblock.example:
Inline-block
Inline-block

keyboard-action.description_short: Enables an element to respond to keyboard keys. Works with keyboard-key and keyboard-word.

left.description_short: Sets the left position of a positioned element.
left.example: Left 20px

letterspacing.description_short: Sets the spacing between letters in text.
letterspacing.example: This text has extra letter spacing

maprun.description_short: Maps and runs actions based on rules.

maptext.description_short: Maps text values based on rules.

maxheight.example: This div cannot be taller than 100px

move.description_short: Moves an element into another element.
move.example:
Target
Move me

onsethtml.description_short: Triggered when the element's HTML content is changed.
onsethtml.example: Original

onvaluechange.description_short: Triggered when the value of an input element changes.

onaftervaluechange.description_short: Triggered after the value of an element has changed.

onbeforevaluechange.description_short: Triggered before the value of an element changes.

ontoggle.description_short: Triggered when an element is toggled.

overflow.description_short: Sets overflow behavior of the element.
overflow.example: This content is clipped when it overflows the container boundaries.

overflowx.example: This text is too long to fit and will scroll horizontally.

prependattr.description_short: Prepends content to an attribute value.

relative.description_short: Sets the element to relative positioning.

right.description_short: Sets the right position of a positioned element.
right.example: Right 20px

scroll.description_short: Scrolls to an element or position.
scroll.example:
Top content

Bottom

table.description_short: Sets the element display to table.
table.example: Cell 1 Cell 2

toggledisplay.description_short: Toggles the display of an element between visible and hidden.

top.description_short: Sets the top position of a positioned element.
top.example: Top 20px

unset.description_short: Resets a CSS property to its inherited or initial value.
